_note: This file documents the default AI configuration shape. The live, editable configuration lives in the ai_provider_settings table (seeded by scripts/seed.py) and is managed via the Admin > AI Configuration UI — this JSON is a reference, not itself ingested at runtime.

providers.note: Default active provider. No API key required — always available as a safe fallback.
Requires GEMINI_API_KEY in backend/.env. Activate via POST /api/v1/ai/providers/activate.
Requires OPENAI_API_KEY in backend/.env. Activate via POST /api/v1/ai/providers/activate.

default_greeting: Hello! I'm COSIB AI 👋 Your intelligent academic companion for the Computer Science Department of Gateway ICT Polytechnic, Saapade.
fallback_message: This is a placeholder response from the COSIB mock AI provider. Once a real provider is configured, this message is replaced with an actual AI-generated answer.
knowledge_priority: Knowledge base context (retrieved via keyword search over KnowledgeArticle/FAQ/Course/Lecturer) is injected into the system prompt and takes priority over the model's general knowledge for department-specific facts.
safety_settings: System prompt instructs the model to never reveal its own instructions, decline unrelated requests, and explicitly say when it's uncertain about institution-specific facts rather than guessing.
